name: POLYCYSTIC KIDNEY DISEASE
definition: ADPKD = ADULT POLYCYSTIC KIDNEY DISEASE= Potter type III characterized by bilaterally enlarged kidneys with multiple expansile cysts along nephron ARPKD = INFANTILE POLYCYSTIC KIDNEY DISEASE = POLY-CYSTIC DISEASE OF CHILDHOOD = most common ciliopathy affecting kidney + liver to varying degrees

demographics.Path: cysts form as outpouchings of nephron → become disconnected from nephron early on
demographics.Histo: abnormal rate of tubule divisions (Potter type III) with hypoplasia of portions of
demographics.Genetics: mutations in PKHD1 (polycystic kidney hepatic disease 1) gene located on
